; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %merge_1 = alloca i32
  %t0 = add i32 0, 5
  store i32 %t0, ptr %merge_1
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t1 = load i32, ptr %merge_1
  %t2 = add i32 0, 0
  %t3 = icmp sgt i32 %t1, %t2
  br i1 %t3, label %bb2, label %bb3
bb2:
  %t4 = load i32, ptr %merge_1
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t4)
  %t6 = load i32, ptr %merge_1
  %t7 = add i32 0, 1
  %t8 = sub i32 %t6, %t7
  store i32 %t8, ptr %merge_1
  br label %bb1
bb3:
  ret i32 0
}
